text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’re approved as moderator. Please review the community guidelines and mod handbook when you get a moment.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’re approved as mentor. Thanks for joining us — please take a look at the mentoring guidelines in the welcome resources.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’re approved as event_helper. Glad to have you onboard — please check the event coordination notes in the welcome resources.
